74870.subject: Revolut’s $115B secondary share sale mints Europe’s first centicorn 🦄; Vinyl raised $20M to replace fax machines in public markets 📠
74870.body:
Weekly FinTech Digest

Автор: Linas Beliūnas


Автор: Linas Beliūnas

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/revoluts-115b-secondary-share-sale-mints-europes-first-linas-beli%C5%ABnas-ligbf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BRGPbhXiAQ2iTtIgYr%2BJD7Q%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3lpriQO0r3csk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqnkap49~rl-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqnkap49-rl
  
👋 Hey, Linas here! Welcome to a 🔓 weekly free edition 🔓 of my daily newsletter. Each day, I focus on 3 stories that are making a difference in the financial technology space. Coupled with things worth watching & most important money movements, it’s the only newsletter you need for all things when Finance meets Tech. If you’re not a subscriber, here’s what you missed last week: Everything Anthropic Shipped in 2026: Every Claude Model, Agent, & Tool - And How to Actually Use Them 🤖 [29 Claude launches in 5 months. Most users missed half of them. Here’s every model, agent, and tool - with the playbook for each one] Loop Engineering: How to Design AI Loops That Build, Ship, and Improve While You Sleep 🔁 [From a three-line bash script to multi-day Claude Fable 5 autonomy — everything founders, builders, and investors need to stop prompting agents and start designing the systems that prompt them] The Complete Guide to Claude Dynamic Workflows 🤖 [From first principles to production: every workflow pattern, cost trap, and real-world use cases founders, builders, and investors need to master Anthropic’s most powerful Claude Code feature yet] You’re Prompting Claude Fable 5 & Mythos 5 Wrong. You Have 10 Days to Fix That 🤖 [The complete Fable 5 playbook for founders, builders, & investors — 12 prompting patterns, the orchestrator architecture, effort economics, and everything you need built before free plan ends 22 June] The Claude Finance Playbook: How CFOs Use AI to Build Models, Forecast Cash, and Close Books Faster 📊 [A practical guide to setting up Claude for real finance work, with battle-tested prompts optimized for Claude Opus 4.7] Ex-OpenAI’s Aschenbrenner Bet $5.5B on AI Chips. Now He’s Betting $8.5B Against Them 💸 [Leopold Aschenbrenner’s AI hedge fund Situational Awareness went from pure AI long to 62% short semiconductors in one quarter. Here’s what changed and why the thesis still holds] Visa and Mastercard’s Agentic AI payment platforms have a volume problem 🤖📊 [what it’s all about, why it matters & why payment titans have a volume problem here + bonus reads into other Visa & Mastercard’s agentic AI moves inside] OpenAI filed for its IPO because Anthropic filed first 🤑📈 [why listing after Anthropic could be critical, and why all eyes should actually be on SpaceX here + a closer look at the most dangerous

74859.subject: The Daily Degen - June 20th, 2026
74859.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-20th-2026

Happy Saturday friends! Lots of stuff going on!
Let’s dive in!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.277T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $740.62
Gold: $4,154.70
Silver: $64.71
Oil (WTI): $76.54
US 10Y Treasury: 4.455%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 21
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
While prices might be in goblintown, there are still untold defi teams getting after it and shipping hard and continuing to build the financial rails the global economy will one day run on!
And a prime example are the dedicated gents at @rocksolidHQ [ https://substack.com/redirect/1dd565fa-afc6-447c-9c64-3bda46076061?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
RockSolid is an extremely cool project built by co-founders Ben Ward @wardy_ben [ https://substack.com/redirect/d0f857c2-73ca-4256-b475-0901023296a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and Steve Pack @paladin_eth [ https://substack.com/redirect/f890c3fc-921f-46f4-9af1-b1b2757a810a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]… designed to bring the best yield-maxxing opportunities possible to the world of defi!
They now have two such vaults: a) the Rocksolid $rETH Vault [ https://substack.com/redirect/2bcfd973-2371-4c2c-bc2b-4090a316ca79?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and b) the RockSolid AutoPlus Looped $ETH Vault [ https://substack.com/redirect/fdd89059-1fe0-4bc8-9e9e-679bfc8022be?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
If you want a great breakdown of everything RockSolid is doing, check out the two excellent interviews embedded below! The first is with Nic Carter’s Castle Island Ventures, and the second is with the Rocket Fuel podcast! 
Also make sure to follow RockSolid on Twitter/X [ https://substack.com/redirect/1dd565fa-afc6-447c-9c64-3bda46076061?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates as well, and stay tuned as we continue shining a light on everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are quite green today. 15 of the top 25 chains are green on the weekly. 
Protocols are also quite green today. 14 of the top 25 protocols are green on the weekly. 
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Chains By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $1M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Protocols By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $1M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 10 Entities By 7 Day Fee Generation (from @DefiLlama):
New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and
